title: Lead-Free PCB Assembly Services | RoHS-Compliant SMT & THT | JHYPCB
metaDescription: JHYPCB provides lead-free PCB assembly services for RoHS-compliant electronics, including SMT, through-hole, mixed assembly, quick-turn, and turnkey support.

paragraphs: JHYPCB is a reliable PCB manufacturer in China and offers rapid PCB prototype service for quick-turn PCB fabrication at high quality and low cost. We can prototype your PCB within 3-7 days.

JHYPCB offers full feature PCB manufacturing services with high reliability to be compatible with your requirement. PCB fabrication services include rigid FR4 PCB, Flexible PCB, Rigid-flex PCB, HDI PCB, High-Frequency PCB, Rogers PCB, Multilayer PCB, Heavy Copper PCB, etc.
Full turnkey PCB assembly services in China. JHYPCB specializes in prototype PCB assembly, quick turn PCB assembly, and low-to-high volume PCB assembly services with production capabilities.

We are a leading PCB manufacturing & PCB assembly manufacturer and supplier in China. We have over ten years of experience in custom PCB fabrication and assembly with advanced PCB technology, high-quality standards & RoHS compliance.

A full-service electronic manufacturing company headquartered in China specializes in printed circuit board manufacturing and assembly services. We will provide a full range of technical support and services for the smooth progress of your project.

Home Services Projects RoHS-Compliant PCB Assembly Manufacturer Lead-Free PCB Assembly Services for RoHS-Compliant Electronics JHYPCB delivers lead-free SMT, through-hole, and mixed PCB assembly services for prototype and production orders, with controlled processes, reliable quality, and flexible turnkey support.

JHYPCB supports lead-free PCB assembly projects with controlled manufacturing processes, flexible production options, and dependable quality standards. From prototype builds to volume production, we help customers meet RoHS compliance requirements while maintaining consistent assembly performance and delivery reliability.

We use lead-free materials and controlled assembly processes to support RoHS-compliant electronics manufacturing. Every key parameter, from solder paste application to reflow conditions and material handling, is managed to improve consistency and solder joint reliability.

Our team supports lead-free SMT , through-hole , and mixed technology PCB assembly for a wide range of product requirements. This allows us to handle both standard electronic assemblies and more complex boards that combine multiple assembly methods.

Whether you need prototype verification , low-volume builds , or fast-turn production support, JHYPCB offers flexible assembly services to match different project stages. Our streamlined workflow helps customers move from initial builds to ongoing production more efficiently.

Quality assurance is built into every stage of our lead-free PCB assembly service. We apply inspection and testing methods such as AOI, electrical testing, and final visual checks to help ensure each assembly meets customer and process requirements.

JHYPCB provides lead-free PCB assembly services for a wide range of board types, assembly requirements, and production schedules. Our manufacturing team supports customers with flexible solutions for prototype, low-volume, and ongoing production projects while maintaining reliable process control and RoHS-compliant standards.
